# cloudtemple_vpc_private_networks (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a list of private networks. Can be filtered by VPC ID.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudtemple_vpc_private_networks" "all" {
}

data "cloudtemple_vpc_private_networks" "filtered_by_vpc" {
  vpc_id = "960fb87a-0e84-4e6e-a6e6-d688dfefe6a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) Filter private networks by VPC ID. If not provided, returns all private networks for the tenant.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `private_networks` (List of Object) List of private networks matching the filter criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--private_networks))

<a id="nestedatt--private_networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `private_networks`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `static_ip_count` (Number)
- `vlan_id` (Number)
- `vpc_id` (String)
